channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Setting Boundaries Still Feels So Radical for Doctors
item.description: Doctors are trained to work without limits, but setting boundaries may improve performance and career longevity.

item.title: Early Oral Immunotherapy May Help Infants Safely Eat Eggs
item.description: Oral immunotherapy with pasteurized egg may reduce the risk of serious reactions from accidental exposure.

item.title: New Vericiguat Analysis Shows Hidden Benefits in HF
item.description: A new study suggests vericiguat may benefit heart failure with reduced ejection fraction, accounting for mortality events.

item.title: The Force Is With You: How Trust Shapes Cancer Care
item.description: Oncologists spend years learning to trust their judgment, blending intuition with reasoning. What happens to that skill when...
